subcodes.first_line: A Book sent down in truth from God, the All-Subduing, the Self-Subsisting, and it calleth all unto that which draweth them nigh unto Him. Verily He [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: کتاب نزل بالحق من لدی الله المهیمن القیوم و یدع الکل الی ما یقربهم الیه انه
subcodes.subjects: @consorting with all; being kind; loving to all, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @being a source of light; guidance, @characteristics and conduct of true believers
